column1: #mapping_set_description: Manually curated SSSOM mappings between FINOS CDM agent/identifier classes and the SPDX 3 agent vocabulary (lmodel/spdx, native namespace https://spdx.org/rdf/3.0.1/terms/).

column9: SPDX Agent is the parent of Person and Organization, like CDM Party
Both represent a human individual acting as an agent
A business unit is an Organization in SPDX terms
Externally-scoped identifier with type and value
Identifier issued for a legal entity
Identifier issued for a natural person
